h3899c00bgbbebg4d07g9023g3e324fa267de: I still can't believe you cleared the roads. Expect I won't until the city gates swing shut behind us.
hd87205e4gf70ag4c80gb821gb5719eefdfc5: I expected goblins at our gate any moment. Glad to say that you made a prettier sight.
h77f98455gcf04g4300g94ecg91082d9f1eb7: We'd be dead if you hadn't been here...
h7bed5b05g31c2g4136gb3a4g0f4915e2e30d: You didn't have to come back. Thank you.
ha94ace99gab23g4499ga9f7gd54bda0d3ca5: I knew they'd find us - I knew it!
hc3793bedgf761g4bbfgb9aag1dc0e74ec65b: Gods... I feel sick. We're not ready for this.
